summary: No scope creep: all 5 changed non-test source files trace to R1-R4 beads and are workflow-owned (cmd/mindspec/adr.go->cmd/**=R3; internal/approve/spec.go->internal/approve/**=R4; internal/validate/{divergence,ownership_resolve,plan}.go->internal/validate/**=R1/R2). internal/contextpack/spec.go correctly UNTOUCHED (normalize-at-source), so context-system is honestly NOT declared. Impacted Domains accuracy confirmed: spec declares workflow only and every changed source .go matches a workflow OWNERSHIP.yaml glob. mindspec validate spec 100-ownership-gate-resolution: all checks passed. Branch hygiene: git diff --stat main...HEAD -- review/ is EMPTY (accidental nekh.3 deletion fixed by restore commit 7e7aab88); no stray artifacts, no unrelated deletions. Doc-sync: the ADR-0032 amendment is the correct doc update for the semantic softening of sub-decision 1 (path-like entries normalized, not rejected); it mirrors spec 099's ADR-0037 amendment pattern. No stale operator-facing docs describe the OLD reject-path-like behavior: ADR-0032 sub-decision 1's original 'path-like rejected' line is preserved as historical decision text and explicitly superseded by the Amendment section (correct ADR convention); USAGE.md only lists the section name; the spec.md template uses generic <domain-N> placeholders with no dir-name-mandatory claim. Completeness: all 4 sub-issues delivered with hermetic tests — 4ft2(R1): 5 TestNormalizeImpactedDomains* helper tests + TestValidateDivergence{FilePathImpactedDomainResolves,NamedDomainUnchanged,GenuinelyUnownedStillFails,ZeroOwnerEntryErrors} + plan-gate TestPlanCoverageFilePathImpactedResolves/TestCheckADRCitationsFilePathImpactedResolves/TestNormalizeZeroAndAmbiguousAtPlanGate, with blast-radius guards TestCompleteRejectsUndeclaredDomainTouch+TestUnownedFileRejected preserved; 3d84(R2): TestPlanCoverageHintMentionsExistingADR/HintCreateWhenNoCitation; 3cfr(R3): TestAdrShowWorktree_*/TestAdrListWorktree_*/TestParseADR_NonListDomainLine; gpoq(R4): TestScaffoldPlanEmitsADRCitations/TestValidatePlanCitationsWarnNamesKey. Nothing deferred. Non-blocking observation: committed .beads/issues.jsonl shows nekh.1 (R1) still in_progress while nekh.2/.3 are closed — a final-merge lifecycle bookkeeping item the cycle closes at merge, not a content/scope defect.
